non_functional_files.reason: Pre-existing tracked backup of policies/tool-policy.v1.json. Not byte-identical to current (different sizes: 21119 vs 31148 bytes). No functional references in hooks/scripts/commands/agents — only INDEX.md auto-generated entries. Last modified 2026-05-12 (12 days ago). Committed once (auto-bulk commit 89e4688).
non_functional_files.recommendation: Delete in a full-repo cleanup cycle; requires INDEX.md regeneration after removal. Not a blocker for this diff close.

orphaned_subagents.note: Pre-existing; not part of this diff scope. Advisory only.

hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh.legacy_markers: architectural context comments only, not deprecated code

policies/tool-policy.v1.json.note: Version bumped 3->4; adds */docs/codex/ and */docs/research/ path prefixes per authorized task declarations

settings.json.note: Minor permission additions and hook registration; no organizational concerns

detect_orphan_scripts.note: Full output truncated; pre-existing findings outside --changed-files scope. All out-of-scope and advisory.

summary.verdict: No new cleanliness issues introduced by this diff. One pre-existing minor advisory (stale backup file policies/tool-policy.v1.json.bak.1778564751) — non-blocking for diff close.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex flagged three issues in the draft: (1) tool-policy.v1.json.bak.1778564751 was miscategorized as duplicate_scripts — it is a config backup not a script; (2) the three pretool-daily-trade-agent-concurrency.py.bak-* files were out of scope for --changed-files mode and should be removed; (3) the venv/__pycache__ .pyc finding was a false positive — those files are gitignored. Codex confirmed the four changed files themselves are correctly assessed as clean.

findings.issue: policies/tool-policy.v1.json.bak.1778564751 was categorized as duplicate_scripts but it is a JSON config backup, not a script
findings.proposed_fix: Move to non_functional_files with wording: pre-existing tracked backup of policies/tool-policy.v1.json; introduced_in_diff:false; severity:minor; safe to remove in a full cleanup if no functional references, with INDEX regeneration as needed
findings.rationale: Codex's categorization is correct — the duplicate_scripts category is for scripts (.sh, .py), not config backups. Finding moved to non_functional_files.

findings.issue: pretool-daily-trade-agent-concurrency.py.bak-* files are not among the four changed files and are unrelated sibling files — out of scope for --changed-files inspection
findings.proposed_fix: Remove from --changed-files findings. If retained in a full-repo run, keep as duplicate_scripts with introduced_in_diff:false; needs_user_confirmation:true (<7 days).
findings.rationale: Scope contract: --changed-files mode restricts to the four listed files only. These bak files are not in the diff and were correctly excluded from the final report.

findings.issue: .pyc files under venv/ are gitignored and not tracked — not a repo cleanliness issue
findings.proposed_fix: Remove this finding entirely. Only report .pyc/__pycache__ when tracked or newly introduced in the inspected diff.
findings.rationale: Confirmed gitignored (venv/ in .gitignore). These files are not tracked and have no impact on repo cleanliness. Finding removed.

findings.issue: The no cleanliness issues introduced conclusions for the four changed files look correct
findings.rationale: Codex confirmed the core assessment of the four changed files is accurate.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Applied all three blocking corrections: (1) recategorized bak config file to non_functional_files; (2) excluded out-of-scope bak script files; (3) removed false-positive venv pyc finding.
